script_text: Look! Reading stories every day is so much fun.
Each story takes you on a new adventure.
Let us see how to enjoy stories all year long.
There are so many kinds of stories!
Funny ones. Brave ones. Silly ones. Sweet ones.
Try a new kind every week. You will find favorites!
When someone reads to you, listen closely.
Look at the pictures. They are part of the story too!
Ask questions if something is tricky.
Pick a cozy spot just for reading. Curl up there every day.
Now you are ready to enjoy stories all year long!
